description_long: This is a medium-sized, bulbous ceramic vase with a wide, slightly flared rim and a rounded body that tapers toward the base. The surface is predominantly off-white with a matte, slightly rough texture, and features hand-painted floral motifs in muted blue, green, and beige tones on one side. The rim and inner edge are tinged with a natural, earthy brown, suggesting some aging or intentional antiquing. The floral decoration consists of two large blue flowers with yellow centers, surrounded by leafy stems and smaller buds. The opposite side of the vase is plain, showing only the textured ceramic surface without any decoration. The overall appearance suggests a decorative piece suitable for display in a garden, park, or urban plaza.
description: A bulbous, off-white ceramic vase with a flared rim and hand-painted blue floral motifs on one side. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with earthy brown accents around the rim.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from an angle showing part of the floral motif and the textured, off-white ceramic surface.
description_view_1: This view displays the plain side of the vase, highlighting the unadorned, rough ceramic texture and the brown-tinged rim.
description_view_2: The vase is shown with a partial view of the floral decoration, revealing more of the painted blue flowers and leafy stems.
description_view_3: The front view features the full floral motif with two prominent blue flowers and green leaves, set against the off-white background.
